def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Generate HTML report from run_loop output")
    parser.add_argument("input", help="Path to JSON output from run_loop.py (or - for stdin)")

summary.parser_block_summary: NDJSON event loop in run_single_query: split buffer by newline, json.loads each line, dispatch on event['type'] (stream_event / assistant / result). Stream branch parses Anthropic content_block_start/tool_use, accumulates input_json_delta/partial_json, resolves on content_block_stop or message_stop.

key_decision_inputs.D2_a6_session_inspection_replacement: Sites N01-N11 in scripts/run_eval.py — whole NDJSON parser block (lines 117-171) and the streaming CLI invocation (lines 70-78) become unnecessary if triggering is detected via session inspection.
key_decision_inputs.D6_plain_text_regex_fallback: Same sites N01-N11; if kept, fall back to parsing the assistant text/content rather than stream events.
key_decision_inputs.viewer_independence: Sites V01-V07 in eval-viewer/* are independent of NDJSON parsing — only V04/V06 hardcode with_skill/without_skill/new_skill/old_skill badge logic, which is a display concern, not a parsing concern.
